returns.excludedArtifacts_: The list of excluded artifact identifiers.

returns.excludedContracts_: The list of excluded contract addresses.

returns.excludedSelectors_: The list of excluded selector configurations.

returns.excludedSenders_: The list of excluded sender addresses.

returns._0: True if any assertion has failed, false otherwise.

returns.targetedArtifactSelectors_: The list of targeted artifact-selector configurations.

returns.targetedArtifacts_: The list of targeted artifact identifiers.

returns.targetedContracts_: The list of targeted contract addresses.

returns.targetedInterfaces_: The list of targeted address-interface configurations.

returns.targetedSelectors_: The list of targeted selector configurations.

returns.targetedSenders_: The list of targeted sender addresses.

failed().notice: Returns true if any test assertion has failed.

targetSenders().notice: Returns sender allowlist configured via `targetSender` (empty means no sender allowlist).

testFuzz_auditFunds_accessControl(addres.notice: withdrawAuditFunds only works for auditFunds address

testFuzz_claimNXL_nothingToClaim(address.notice: claimNXL reverts when nothing to claim

testFuzz_claimStable_nothingToClaim(addr.notice: claimStable reverts when nothing to claim

testFuzz_noSelfReferral().notice: Self-referral is silently ignored — purchase succeeds

testFuzz_noTicketCollision().notice: Multiple buyers never get the same ticket

testFuzz_nxlSupplyConstant(uint8).notice: NXL total supply never changes during purchases

testFuzz_ticketAccounting(uint8).notice: Ticket accounting: total sold = sum of individual buys

documentation.text: @notice Self-referral is silently ignored — purchase succeeds
@notice claimStable reverts when nothing to claim
@notice claimNXL reverts when nothing to claim
@notice withdrawAuditFunds only works for auditFunds address
@notice Ticket accounting: total sold = sum of individual buys
@notice NXL total supply never changes during purchases
@notice Multiple buyers never get the same ticket
